title: Under Night In-Birth EXE:Late
notes: Engine issue where an opponent will start with 0-ish health, AI doesn't start.
Runs well except for video playback and online multiplayer.
title: UNDER NIGHT IN-BIRTH Exe:Late

notes: Out of the box the game is unstable and prone to crashing; disabling Esync seems to fix this. Network features seem functional, leaderboards work but was unable to find a match to verify. Intro and gallery videos do not play; these require winetricks wmp9 which cannot be installed in a 64-bit prefix.
